reviews.comment:
Atención rápida, pero difícil acceso a cada expendedor cuando se encuentran ocupados por otros vehículos, debido al tráfico sobre Humberto Primero y el paso peatonal (vereda)

(Translated by Google)
Fast service, but difficult access to each dispenser when they are occupied by other vehicles, due to traffic on Humberto Primero and the pedestrian crossing (sidewalk).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLa19MeDhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Playero 10 puntos
Café atención 2 puntos
Aire gratis. 10 puntos
Combustible. Gasoil Infinia CON AGUA  0 PUNTOS
Surtidor. LO MAS GRAVE. Carga menos de lo que dice . Mi tanque es de 65lts con la reserva según manual. Imposible que entren 66 litros y quedando un octavo de tanque.
Para salir de la duda volví y paso exactamente lo mismo. Último surtidor de la derecha. Próxima vez escrito a defensa del consumidor. Es raro para una ACA pero es la verdad. Faltan controles de calibración en de surtidor. Fui a la madrugada.

(Translated by Google)
Station Attendance: 10 points
Coffee Service: 2 points
Free Air: 10 points
Fuel: Infinia Diesel WITH WATER: 0 points
Pumping Station: THE WORST ISSUE. It dispenses less than advertised. My tank holds 65 liters, including the reserve according to the manual. It's impossible that it would hold 66 liters and still have an eighth of the tank left.
To be sure, I went back and the exact same thing happened. Last pump on the right. Next time I'll file a complaint with consumer protection. It's strange for an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), but it's the truth. They need to perform calibration checks on the pumps. I went in the early morning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLX2RQVUp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden 24hs, reciben tarjetas, efectivo y hasta Mercadopago; y lo más importante, el compresor de aire para controlar las cubiertas puede usarse son pagar aparte.

(Translated by Google)
They are open 24 hours a day, accept cards, cash and even MercadoPago; and most importantly, the air compressor for checking tires can be used without paying extra.
